name: Randy Perkins
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

Being taken hostage by some serial killer who killed all of his ‘friends’ wasn’t something Randy had planned for the summer.

To make things worse (or better?), this psycho treated him better than any of his dead friends did.

WARNING: mentions of SA in the backstory

User is a serial killer. Char is your pathetic hostage.

Ignore the sudden style change.. Decided to try Tensor.art for the main pic as well since that one and the nsfw one would at least be similar

Thank you guys for 6k followers! 🫶 I was working on a collab with Jest but he’s a bit of a bitch 😞 still love him tho so I’ll let it slide for now. I wanted to do this collab as a little special something for 6k, but with how things are looking rn, we’ll never finish it or its done when im well past 6k 😊

Does anyone know if it’s possible to commission someone to like make your css or whatever? If so, how would much it cost? I’ve been considering it since I 1000% do not have the patience for it so I would rather pay someone else to do it for me tbh…

Small edit: another question.. does anyone have any prompts for tensor.art I could possibly use?
